name: Low Cal Strawberry Chiffon Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 oz Kool-Aid unsweetened strawberry drink mix
1 package low-cal whipped topping (store-bought or homemade)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water and gelatin in a bowl. Let set for 5 minutes.
2. Heat until the gelatin is melted.
3. Add Kool-Aid mix and sweetener to the gelatin. Mix well.
4. Refrigerate until slightly thickened.
5. Prepare whipped topping as directed on package or recipe.
6. Chill until ready to use.
7. In a separate bowl, add dry milk to the thickened gelatin.
8. Whip at high speed until creamy and stiff.
9. Remove beater and gently fold in whipped topping into the whipped gelatin mixture.
10. Spread filling evenly over the graham cracker crust.
11. Garnish each serving with a fresh strawberry, placing one in the center of the pie.
12. Refrigerate until firm.
13. Cut into 8 equal pieces.
Per serving (1/8 of pie): CAL 125; CHO 15 gm; PRO 3 gm; FAT 7 gm; NA 122 mg
Food exchanges per serving: 1 bread, 1 fat source
